items.title: Wells Fargo: Apple iPhone 17 Price Hike Set to Lift Revenue
items.description: Apple Bets on Premium Pricing as iPhone 17 Launch Nears

items.title: Why Apple's stock may not move much on new product announcements
items.description: Apple (AAPL) is set to unveil new products at an event on Tuesday, Sept. 9. However, unless there is a big AI announcement, investors don't expect the stock to move much. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Allie Canal and Blue Chip Daily Trend Report chief technical strategist Larry Tentarelli explain why in the video above. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Opening Bid.

items.title: iPhone 17 Air to take stage at Apple’s 'Awe Dropping' show
items.description: Apple’s “Awe Dropping” fall show is expected to replay the company’s careful hand: Polish the hardware, bundle the ecosystem, delay the hard questions

items.title: iPhone 17 launches tomorrow, but the crypto community isn't buying
items.description: Crypto traders dismiss iPhone 17, saying Apple still ignores Web3 features.

items.title: Apple's Upcoming 'Awe Dropping' Event With iPhone 17 Air Draws Criticism As Commentator Daniel Newman Slams 'Lack Of Innovation'
items.description: As Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) gears up for its highly anticipated iPhone 17 launch, industry analyst Daniel Newman has criticized the company for relying on predictable upgrades rather than delivering innovation. Daniel Newman Says Apple Is ‘Better Than ...
